com.nexacro.java.xapi.data

Class PlatformData

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.nexacro.java.xapi.data.PlatformData
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    java.io.Serializable, java.lang.Cloneable

    public class PlatformData
extends java.lang.Object
implements java.lang.Cloneable, java.io.Serializable

    it is the tup data of X-API, and a basic unit of data communication or data movement. i.e. when transmitting/receiving server and data, or delivering data between classes, conduct by using PlatformData.

    PlatformData contain VariableList and DataSetList, and saves Variables and Dataset.

    Author:
    Choi, Jongkwan
    See Also:
    Serialized Form

    • Constructor Detail

      • PlatformData

        public PlatformData()
        basic creator.

    • Method Detail

      • getSaveType

        public int getSaveType()
        Return saving method. When transformed to another type data(stream) by DataSerializer, it indicates which data to save among added, modified, and deleted data. If no separate setting is made or DataSet.SAVE_TYPE_NONE is set, it is saved by the DataSet.SAVE_TYPE_NORMAL saving method. Moreover, if separate saving method is set to each DataSet, it is saved by the set method, and comply to PlatformData saving method only when it was not designated.
        Returns:
        saving method
        See Also:
        setSaveType(int), DataSet.SAVE_TYPE_NONE, DataSet.SAVE_TYPE_ALL, DataSet.SAVE_TYPE_NORMAL, DataSet.SAVE_TYPE_UPDATED, DataSet.SAVE_TYPE_DELETED

      • setSaveType

        public void setSaveType(int saveType)
        Set saving method. When transformed to other type data(stream) by DataSerializer, it indicates which data to save among added, modified, and deleted data.
        Parameters:
        saveType - saving method
        See Also:
        getSaveType(), DataSet.setSaveType(int)
